name: NTAO BYOV Operational Assessment
description: NTAO operational assessment for BYOV program suitability

steps.title: Stop Current Operations
steps.description: Halt all current shipments and orders for original van

substeps.title: Stop shipment to original van
substeps.description: Halt all active shipments directed to the original van

substeps.title: Cancel all back order parts
substeps.description: Cancel all pending back order parts for the original van

steps.title: Vehicle Assessment and New Setup
steps.description: Assess vehicle requirements and initiate new truck stock shipment

substeps.title: Verify vehicle details to identify the ideal truck stock
substeps.description: Review vehicle specifications to determine appropriate truck stock configuration

substeps.title: Start shipment of new truck stock to new byov
substeps.description: Initiate shipment of appropriate truck stock to the new BYOV vehicle
